headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Texas Instruments, Linde, BHP Group, Landmark Bancorp and Global Self Storage
summary: TXN, LIN and BHP lead Zacks research picks as strong demand, project backlogs and commodity exposure support growth prospects.
